About Archives

I'll Jury Your Duty

Feb 21, 2025

I remember scouring the internet for other peoples’ experiences with jury duty when I first got my summons and not finding a ton of stuff. If you’re reading this then either I suggested this post to you or you are doing the same as I was, I hope my experience can help you out.

Mailbox

You check your mailbox and boom, you see you have been summoned for jury duty. Congratulations,
